profile.args: acodec=aac channels=1 f=mp4 vcodec=h264_vaapi vglobal_quality=%quality vq=%quality
profile.name: 4k30fpsMp4_h264_vaapiVBRQ16

profile.args: acodec=pcm_f32le ar=48000 channels=1 f=wav properties=WAV vcodec=a64multi video_off=1
profile.name: WAVmono

profile.args: acodec=pcm_f32le ar=48000 channels=1 f=wav properties=WAV vcodec=a64multi video_off=1
profile.name: audio-WAVmono

profile.args: acodec=aac ar=48000 channels=2 f=mp4 vcodec=h264_vaapi vglobal_quality=%quality vq=%quality
profile.name: GPU

profile.args: ab=%audiobitrate+'k' acodec=aac ar=48000 channels=2 f=mp4 vcodec=hevc_vaapi vglobal_quality=%quality vq=%quality
profile.name: GPU-2

profile.args: f=mp4 level=51 tier=high vaapi_device=/dev/dri/renderD128 vcodec=hevc_vaapi vf='format=nv12,hwupload' vglobal_quality=18
profile.name: GPU-4k_experiemtntal

profile.args: ab=256k acodec=aac crf=15 f=mp4 preset=slow vcodec=libx265
profile.name: Yt terminal 4k CPU rendering

profile.args: ab=256k acodec=aac b=60M bufsize=120M f=mp4 maxrate=60M minrate=60M preset=slow vcodec=libx265
profile.name: Yt terminal 4k CPU Brute F

profile.args: ab=320k acodec=aac ar=48000 channels=2 crf=14 f=mp4 pix_fmt=yuv444p preset=veryslow vcodec=libx265
profile.name: cpu_max

profile.args: ab=192k acodec=aac ar=48000 channels=2 f=mp4 vcodec=hevc_vaapi vglobal_quality=16
profile.name: GPU-2_updated
